Custom Streetwear Manufacturing in Pakistan

July 1, 2026 | By FABRIOZA

Streetwear isn't just clothing — it's culture. And culture demands authenticity. At FABRIOZA, we manufacture premium streetwear for brands that refuse to compromise: heavyweight hoodies, boxy tees, washed effects, and puff print — all from our ISO 9001 certified facility in Pakistan with MOQ starting at 50 pieces.

Why Pakistan for Streetwear?

Pakistan has emerged as a top destination for premium streetwear production for three reasons:

1. Premium Cotton

Pakistan's long-staple cotton produces exceptionally soft yet durable fabrics. The same cotton fields supply major luxury brands. When you want a heavyweight tee that gets better with every wash, Pakistani cotton delivers.

2. Cost Advantage

Labor costs are 30-40% lower than China for comparable quality. This means you can offer premium construction at competitive retail prices — or enjoy higher margins.

3. Garment Washing Expertise

Pakistani factories have decades of experience in garment washing — enzyme washes, acid washes, vintage treatments. This expertise is essential for authentic streetwear aesthetics.

Our Streetwear Specialties

Heavyweight T-Shirts (220-300gsm)

Boxy, oversized fits with dropped shoulders. 100% ringspun cotton or cotton-poly blends. Garment-dyed for lived-in color. Reinforced neck seams and double-needle stitching.

Premium Hoodies (320-400gsm)

French terry and brushed fleece options. Oversized, cropped, or standard fits. Custom drawstrings, kangaroo pockets, and ribbed cuffs that hold shape.

Joggers & Sweatpants

Tapered, straight, or wide-leg. Elastic waistbands with drawstrings. Side pockets, back zip pockets, and cuffed or open ankles.

Specialty Finishes

  • Garment Washing: Enzyme, acid, vintage, mineral wash
  • Puff Print: Raised, textured ink for bold graphics
  • Cracked Print: Vintage distressed aesthetic
  • Reflective Details: 3M reflective for techwear brands
  • Embossed/Debossed: Tonal texture without ink
